title: Classification and Change Detection of Vegetation in the City of Cape Town
subtitle: GeoAI Final Project

authors.name: Moerice Joel Kalangit
authors.jobdesk: Penetapan wilayah studi, akuisisi Sentinel-2, cloud masking SCL, median composite, clipping ke batas Kota Cape Town.

authors.name: Zahrotul Mu'minati
authors.jobdesk: Pembuatan 360 titik ground truth seimbang untuk tahun 2024 dan 2025 termasuk penambahan titik pada area transisi spektral.

authors.name: Achmad Taufik Alfarizy
authors.jobdesk: Penyusunan feature stack (7 fitur), split dataset 70:30 (seed 42), pelatihan Random Forest (100 trees), klasifikasi tahun 2024 dan 2025.

authors.name: Hafizhah Dea Az Zahrah
authors.jobdesk: Confusion Matrix, Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-score, Feature Importance, Change Detection, Vectorisasi hasil, ekspor GeoJSON.

authors.name: Haryo Raafi Antarikso
authors.jobdesk: Pengembangan WebGIS interaktif, integrasi Leaflet, dashboard, visualisasi layer, UI/UX.

authors.name: Ahmad Rafly
authors.jobdesk: Pengelolaan GitHub Repository, README, dokumentasi teknis, penyusunan laporan, koordinasi presentasi.

description: This project analyzes and classifies vegetation cover in the City of Cape Town using Sentinel-2 imagery (2024–2025) and a Random Forest classifier, detecting spatial change patterns through a WebGIS dashboard.
